display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required, slug-style identifier)

project_scope.mechanism: Self-contained directory installed via Kiro Powers panel (UI installation, no fixed filesystem path)

providerExtensions.name: displayName frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Human-readable label distinct from the slug-style 'name' field; used by Kiro for UI display.

providerExtensions.name: keywords frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Array of activation trigger words used by Kiro's automatic power-loading system.

providerExtensions.name: steering/ directory
providerExtensions.summary: Optional steering/ subdirectory containing workflow-specific guidance files loaded on-demand.

providerExtensions.name: mcp.json bundled in power directory
providerExtensions.summary: Optional mcp.json inside the power directory declaring MCP servers; server names in POWER.md must match keys.

providerExtensions.name: Onboarding section in POWER.md
providerExtensions.summary: Dedicated '# Onboarding' section whose instructions Kiro runs automatically on first activation.
